Interface IProjectiveXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a projective transform.

[Guid("E2FA80D1-EE50-43FA-834F-50D056AAE150")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IProjectiveXform : IGeodataXform
